core.label: PureScript Fundamentals
core.description: Strongly typed functional programming that compiles to JavaScript.

topics.label: Installation & spago
topics.description: Install PureScript and spago build tool. PureScript compiles to readable JS.

topics.label: Types & Values
topics.description: Int, Number, String, Boolean, Array, Record. Sound type system with inference.

topics.label: Functions & Pattern Matching
topics.description: Curried functions, guards, and pattern matching on data constructors.

topics.label: Algebraic Data Types
topics.description: data for sum types, newtype for zero-cost wrappers, type for aliases.

topics.label: Type Classes
topics.description: class/instance for ad-hoc polymorphism. Eq, Ord, Show, Functor, Monad.

topics.label: Effects (Effect & Aff)
topics.description: Effect for sync side effects, Aff for async. PureScript separates pure from effectful code.

topics.label: Records & Row Types
topics.description: Extensible records with row polymorphism. More flexible than Haskell records.

topics.label: FFI (JavaScript Interop)
topics.description: Call JavaScript from PureScript with foreign imports.
